ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  "data_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type */,
  "data_type_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easier search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_start" INTEGER /* Starting age for the age group */,
  "age_end" INTEGER /* Ending age for the age group */,
  "age_label" TEXT /* Label for the age group */,
  "age_span" INTEGER /* Span of the age group */,
  "age_sort" INTEGER /* Sort order for the age group */,
  "age_group_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the value belongs to */,
  "data_value" INTEGER /* Value of the data */,
  "data_value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value */,
  "data_value_source" TEXT /* Source of the specific data value */,
  "data_value_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_years" (
  "data_source_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which data is available */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_years_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_value_versions" (
  "data_value_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value version */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data value */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_value_versions_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_value_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being changed */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data value being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the audit log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
